title: Jewellery Boxes
body:
💍 About 🎁

Jewellery Boxes adds jewellery boxes of three different sizes. - The large box stores up to 8 stacks of items and displays the first 4 items. - The medium box stores up to 4 stacks of items and displays the first 2 items. - The small box stores up to 2 stacks of items and displays the first item.


Crafting

Jewellery boxes are crafted using dark oak slabs, black wool and glass.

Larger boxes can be split into the subsequent smaller box. This crafting can be reversed to created the original larger box.


Credit

This mod was made for u/Slimer_53 on Reddit
